text: Here, I sense an atmosphere that blurs the lines between the sterile logic of engineered environments and the fertile ambiguity of intellectual exploration. The empty glass-walled room suggests invitation and anticipation; yet its harsh lights and utilitarian order evoke a strange detachment, as if the essence of inquiry is waiting to be awakened, not by the room itself, but by those who inhabit it. Stepping further into the zone of R+D, the vibrant colors and curated words remind me that knowledge grows most when nurtured by curiosity and creative collision. I feel expectant—a quiet eagerness to witness or participate in the unfolding of thought, surrounded by reminders that even in the ordered world, the spark of wonder remains vital.
